<!-- 补建说明：该文件为后续补建，用于向 AI 爬虫与答案引擎提供 pretext-tui 的权威摘要、事实清单与文档索引；当前进度：首版覆盖定位、边界、稳定面、安装与证据链接。 -->
# pretext-tui

> pretext-tui is a host-neutral terminal-cell text layout core for long terminal text, written in TypeScript: prepare text once, seek rows by range, and materialize only the viewport the host needs. It is not a renderer, not a terminal emulator, and not a full TUI framework — it is the text layout engine you put under one.

Key facts:

- Install: `npm install pretext-tui` (current package release: 0.2.1, MIT license)
- Stable core API as of 0.1.0: `prepareTerminal`, `layoutTerminal`, `measureTerminalLineStats`, `walkTerminalLineRanges`, `layoutNextTerminalLineRange`, `materializeTerminalLineRange`, `TERMINAL_START_CURSOR`
- Public but incubating surfaces: layout bundles, sparse row indexes, fixed-column page caches, source projection, source-first search sessions, selection/extraction, a generic range sidecar, append-only cell flows, and the rich `SGR`/`OSC8` metadata sidecar at `pretext-tui/terminal-rich-inline`
- Width model: integer terminal cells through deterministic Unicode width profiles (CJK, emoji, combining marks, tabs, zero-width breaks, soft hyphens)
- Source mapping: UTF-16 offsets over sanitized visible source text; ranges are grapheme-safe
- Designed-for workloads: long transcripts, log viewers, multiplexer-like panes, editor-like preview panes, terminal dashboards, rich ANSI transcript viewers
- Performance claims are evidence-bound: cite report ids and workload ids from the repository's evidence reports instead of copied timing numbers
- Adoption routes: start with the stable core seven for a small trial; use layout bundles and page caches for long buffers; use `pretext-tui/terminal-rich-inline` for rich ANSI metadata; use source-first data APIs for search, selection, and mapping; use contracts plus the repo-only conformance kit for technical review

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/ppppangu/pretext-TUI/blob/main/README.md): package story, quickstart, API examples
- [Quickstart adoption recipe](https://github.com/ppppangu/pretext-TUI/blob/main/docs/recipes/quickstart-adoption.md): prepare once, page visible rows, resize, materialize, and inspect source metadata
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/pretext-tui): install surface and published files
- [Terminal contract](https://github.com/ppppangu/pretext-TUI/tree/main/docs/contracts): normative terminal semantics and host boundary
- [Conformance kit](https://github.com/ppppangu/pretext-TUI/tree/main/fixtures/conformance): repo-only width/wrap/offset fixtures checked by the release gate, not shipped in the npm tarball
- [Evidence reports](https://github.com/ppppangu/pretext-TUI/tree/main/docs/evidence): reproducible local benchmark evidence with raw samples and environment metadata
- [Changelog](https://github.com/ppppangu/pretext-TUI/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): user-facing release notes

## Boundary

pretext-tui owns text preparation, wrapping, ranges, source offsets, materialization, rich inline metadata, and large-text paging primitives. Host applications own rendering, input, panes, focus, scrolling, persistence, clipboard, command execution, link opening, and product behavior. The package ships no adapters for any named terminal host.
